title: Responsive Tooltip

statement.markdown:
heading: ## Responsive Tooltip
description
requirements
1. The tooltip should appear on hover and stay visible until the user interacts with the tooltip or moves off the parent element.
2. The tooltip should be position relative to its parent and not overlap with the parent's content.
3. The tooltip should be fully responsive and work on different screen sizes.
4. The tooltip text should be centered horizontally and vertically within the tooltip element.
5. The tooltip should have a close button to dismiss it early.

constraints: Using external resources such as images or fonts

starterCode.html:
index.html Responsive Tooltip

This is a tooltip

gradingCriteria.description: The tooltip is fully responsive and works on different screen sizes.
The tooltip appears on hover and stays visible until the user interacts with the tooltip or moves off the parent element.
The tooltip has a close button to dismiss it early.
The tooltip is position relative to its parent and does not overlap with the parent's content.
The tooltip text is centered horizontally and vertically within the tooltip element.
